items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of agent-specific rate limits, but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case and prior steps do not address the specific requirement of validating the behavior of agent-specific rate limits, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated.
